title: Beachhead = STR tax & financial templates
context: Choosing the wedge product among ~12 STR-host pain points. Tax season pressure is universal, mandatory, expensive — high willingness-to-pay.
decision: Tax+financial templates as the wedge. Other categories follow as expansion.
rationale: Tax filings are non-negotiable, deadline-driven, and high-stakes. Customers actively search for solutions — lower CAC than education-required wedges.

title: Brand: The STR Ledger / thestrledger.com
decision: The STR Ledger. Locked in brand-decisions.md.
rationale: Conveys financial seriousness + STR niche specificity. .com available. Memorable. Sister-site domain pattern (str{X}.tools) ties cleanly to the hub.

title: Multi-storefront distribution (Etsy + Gumroad + own-site)
context: Where to sell the templates. Single-channel focus vs. spread.
decision: All three. Etsy is acquisition (buyers find us), own-site is the destination (best margins, full funnel control), Gumroad is backup + simpler-buyer segment.
rationale: Each storefront has a different traffic source. Diversification reduces platform-risk. Etsy SEO ≠ Google SEO, captures different intent.
